data.name: RAG Financial Intelligence Platform
data.description: Production RAG pipeline enabling wealth managers to query thousands of financial documents in plain English. LangChain + Pinecone + Neo4j graph database. Adopted by 3 enterprise teams at Fidelity in 4 weeks. 58% query latency reduction via multi-hop graph traversal.

data.name: AI Meal Planner
data.description: Personalized meal planning app powered by OpenAI API and RAG architecture. Achieves 40% reduction in irrelevant recommendations via vector similarity search over nutritional embeddings. Built with Next.js 14, Pinecone, and PostgreSQL. Sub-2s response times with Redis caching.

data.name: Sketch-to-Image Generative AI
data.description: Real-time sketch-to-photorealistic image generator using Stable Diffusion + ControlNet. Sub-3s end-to-end latency with Python FastAPI backend and React canvas frontend. Supports 10+ artistic styles and iterative refinement through chat-style prompts.

data.name: GraphQL API Gateway
data.description: High-performance GraphQL API gateway with Redis caching and Apollo Federation. Unified 5 microservices into a single federated graph, reducing client-side over-fetching by 60% and average API response time by 45%. Supports real-time subscriptions via WebSocket.

data.name: Cloud Encryption Platform
data.description: Multi-layer security platform for cloud storage using AES-256 + RSA hybrid encryption. Research published in Scopus-indexed journal. Python backend with web interface for key management, file encryption, and access control auditing.

data.name: Jarvis AI Assistant
data.description: Voice-activated AI assistant built with Python NLP pipelines — web search, system control, weather, news, and task automation. Early exploration of conversational AI and intent classification that later informed production RAG pipeline design.
